acceptedAnswer.text: ArtImageHub charges a one-time US$4.99 unlock for unlimited photo restorations and HD downloads. There is no free tier and no subscription. The price covers ongoing AI inference costs.

mainEntity.name: How long does photo restoration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typical processing time is 30-90 seconds per photo, depending on image size and damage level.
JPG, PNG, and WEBP, up to 20 MB per upload.
Yes. Uploaded photos are deleted within 24 hours and are never used to train AI models or shared externally.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to create an account?

acceptedAnswer.text: No account required. Email is collected only at payment for receipt and access recovery.
English, Spanish, Portuguese (Brazil), French, German, Japanese, Korean, and Simplified Chinese.
Yes. Refunds are available within 30 days, no questions asked.

ArtImageHub uses an open-source pipeline combining GFPGAN for face enhancement (arXiv:2101.04061), Real-ESRGAN for super-resolution up to 4x (arXiv:2107.10833), and a colorization model for black-and-white photos.
